hero.subtitle: Replace overbuilt, underperforming platforms with a solution that's easy to use, quick to deploy, and built to deliver value from day one.

platform.label: THE PLATFORM
platform.contact_center_desc: Omnichannel contact center with intelligent routing, real-time monitoring, and AI built in.
platform.business_phone_desc: Calls, messages, and meetings in one place. For every team, every location, and every device.
platform.analytics_desc: Real-time visibility across every queue, agent, and interaction, with AI that turns your data into plain-language answers.
platform.goai_desc: AI that handles the routine tasks, so your agents can focus on the conversations that matter.

goai.desc: GoAI isn't bolted on — it's woven into every layer of the platform. From intelligent routing and real-time agent assist to automated quality scoring and predictive analytics, AI works behind the scenes so your team can focus on what matters most: your customers.

promos.promo1_desc: Go live in under a week with guided onboarding, pre-built integrations, and a platform that just works — no consultants required.
promos.promo2_desc: Every customer gets a dedicated success manager, hands-on implementation guidance, and ongoing strategic support — so you're never left figuring it out alone.
promos.promo3_desc: From 10 agents to 10,000 — our infrastructure grows with you. Enterprise-grade reliability with 99.999% uptime guaranteed.

testimonials.t1_quote: We replaced three separate tools with Broadvoice and saw a 35% improvement in first-call resolution within the first month.
testimonials.t2_quote: The AI-powered analytics alone paid for the entire platform. We're making decisions in minutes that used to take days.
testimonials.t3_quote: Our agents love it. The interface is intuitive, the AI assist is genuinely helpful, and the deployment was the smoothest I've ever seen.

faq.a1: Most teams are fully live within 5-7 business days. Our guided onboarding process handles migration, integration setup, and agent training so there's minimal disruption to your operations.
faq.q2: Can I keep my existing phone numbers?
faq.a2: Absolutely. We handle full number porting at no extra cost. Your customers won't notice a thing — except better service.
faq.a3: We offer native integrations with Salesforce, HubSpot, Zendesk, Microsoft Teams, Slack, and 50+ other tools. Our open API lets you connect virtually anything.
faq.q4: Is there a minimum contract commitment?
faq.a4: We offer flexible monthly and annual plans. Annual plans come with a discount, but there's no long-term lock-in required.
faq.q5: How does GoAI differ from other AI solutions?
faq.a5: GoAI is built into the platform — not bolted on. It learns from your specific call patterns, agent behaviors, and customer interactions to deliver insights that are actually relevant to your business.

cta_block.subtitle: Join thousands of teams delivering exceptional customer experiences with Broadvoice.

meta.title: Broadvoice — CX Platform for Modern Business
meta.description: Replace overbuilt, underperforming platforms with a CX solution that's easy to use, quick to deploy, and built to deliver value from day one.

uc_page.hero_subtitle: One cloud platform for calls, video, messaging, and collaboration — all under a single number. Your team stays connected everywhere. Your customers never notice the difference.
uc_page.b1_desc: Crystal-clear HD voice that travels with your team. Smart call routing, auto-attendant, and voicemail-to-email keep every conversation moving — even when you can't pick up.
uc_page.b2_desc: Face-to-face meetings without the commute. HD video with screen sharing, recording, and virtual backgrounds turns any space into a boardroom.
uc_page.b3_desc: Conversations that drive decisions, not clutter. Channels, threads, and instant file sharing keep your team aligned and moving fast.
uc_page.b4_desc: Know who's available before you reach out. Shared contacts, presence indicators, and a unified directory eliminate the guesswork of working together.
uc_page.b5_desc: Your conversations are your business — literally. End-to-end encryption, SSO, compliance certifications, and granular access controls protect every interaction.
uc_page.b6_desc: Office, home, airport, coffee shop — it doesn't matter. Desktop, mobile, and web apps deliver the same powerful experience on every device, everywhere.
uc_page.f1_desc: Stop juggling separate tools for voice, video, SMS, and chat. b-hive unifies every channel under a single business number — so customers always know how to reach you, and your team can respond from any device without missing a beat.
uc_page.f2_desc: Your workforce isn't tied to a desk anymore — your phone system shouldn't be either. b-hive delivers the same powerful experience whether your team is in headquarters, working from home, or closing deals on the road. Real-time presence and hot desking mean no one ever falls out of the loop.
uc_page.f3_desc: Forget waiting on IT tickets or vendor support calls. b-hive's intuitive web portal puts you in control — add users, build call flows with drag-and-drop, and track performance with real-time analytics. What used to take hours now takes minutes.

sip_page.hero_subtitle: Replace expensive landlines with cloud-powered SIP trunks. Keep your hardware, cut costs by up to 70%, and scale capacity on demand.
sip_page.benefits_subtitle: SIP trunks swap your phone lines for the internet you already pay for — simpler, cheaper, and infinitely more scalable.
sip_page.b1_desc: No rip-and-replace. SIP trunking layers cloud power onto the phones you already own — zero disruption, instant upgrade.
sip_page.b2_desc: Ditch expensive landlines. Unlimited SIP trunks slash your monthly phone bill while delivering better call quality.
sip_page.b3_desc: Spin up new lines in seconds. Handle seasonal spikes and sudden call surges without calling your provider.
sip_page.f1_desc: SIP trunking gives your existing phone system the full power of the cloud — voicemail, caller ID, auto attendant, call recording, virtual fax, and local numbers in any ZIP code. When call volume spikes, bursting kicks in automatically so you never miss a customer.
sip_page.f2_desc: Manage every location, every user, and every call flow from a single intuitive dashboard. Add extensions, configure menus, review real-time analytics, and let team members personalize their own settings — all without waiting on IT.
sip_page.f3_title: Pay only for what you use.
sip_page.f3_desc: SIP trunks replace your legacy provider with pricing that actually makes sense. Choose call-path pricing for lighter usage or unlimited trunks for high-volume teams. Bursting lets you expand capacity instantly during peak periods — and scale back down when things quiet down.
sip_page.g1_desc: Capture every conversation for training, compliance, and quality assurance.
sip_page.g2_desc: Send and receive faxes directly through email — no machine needed.
sip_page.g3_desc: Route callers with professional menus you build in minutes.
sip_page.g4_desc: Plug your existing hardware into the cloud. No new equipment required.
sip_page.g5_desc: Mix cloud seats, unlimited trunks, and call paths across every location.
sip_page.g6_desc: Automatically expand capacity the moment traffic spikes hit.
sip_page.g7_desc: Give your global teams local presence with US-originating international numbers.
sip_page.g8_desc: See exactly where calls come from, when they peak, and how they convert.

video_page.hero_subtitle: Calling, video, texting, and collaboration — unified in a single interface. Your team communicates faster. Your customers get better answers.
video_page.b1_desc: Call, text, chat, and video conference with customers and teammates — all from a single interface and one business number.
video_page.b2_desc: A completely redesigned experience with faster performance, cleaner UI, and enterprise-grade encrypted video.
video_page.b3_desc: Every standard b-hive seat includes Communicator. Pro seats unlock full video conferencing and screen sharing.
video_page.f1_desc: Follow up a call with a text. Escalate a chat into a video meeting. Share your screen mid-conversation. Communicator lets your team move fluidly between channels without ever switching apps — so customers get faster answers and teammates stay in sync.
video_page.f2_desc: Give your team the tools to work together from anywhere. Host video conferences with up to 50 participants, create persistent chat groups, share files in real time, and use personal meeting links that make scheduling effortless. Your full company directory is always a click away.
video_page.f3_desc: Carry your entire business phone system wherever you go. The all-new mobile app for iOS and Android lets you place calls, send texts, join video meetings, and collaborate with your team — all from your business number, not your personal one.
video_page.g1_desc: Make, take, and manage calls with mute, hold, and transfer — right from your desktop.
video_page.g2_desc: Message teammates one-on-one or in groups with persistent, searchable threads.
video_page.g3_desc: Crystal-clear video meetings for up to 50 participants with one click.
video_page.g4_desc: Send and receive SMS from your business number to any mobile device.
video_page.g5_desc: Present slides, walk through apps, or share your full desktop in seconds.
video_page.g6_desc: Every user gets a unique video room URL — plus schedulable links for future meetings.
video_page.g7_desc: Keep video calls private. Only the host can admit guests from the lobby.
video_page.g8_desc: Record voice and video calls on demand and store them for review.
video_page.g9_desc: Full meeting details with recordings and chat transcripts, always accessible.
video_page.g10_desc: Speech-to-text voicemail and virtual fax — no extra hardware needed.
video_page.g11_desc: See who's available, busy, or away in real time across your entire org.
video_page.g12_desc: Secure, encrypted communications that meet healthcare compliance standards.

sms_page.hero_subtitle: Reach customers where they actually respond — their phones. Send 1:1 messages or launch campaigns, all from your business number.
sms_page.b1_desc: Set it and forget it. Schedule outbound texts to groups or individuals and let automation handle the follow-up.
sms_page.b2_desc: Route incoming texts to the right agent or team automatically — just like you do with calls.
sms_page.b3_desc: Text from your existing b-hive business number. One bill, one platform, zero friction.
sms_page.f1_desc: Engage customers with 1:1 conversations or reach thousands with targeted text campaigns. Organize contacts with tags, route inbound messages like calls, and use templates to respond faster — all from your business number.
sms_page.f2_desc: Group contacts into segments for precise outbound messaging. Bulk upload from your CRM via CSV, sync contacts through our open API, and assign agent teams to specific customer groups so the right person always responds.
sms_page.f3_desc: Schedule bulk texts as one-offs or automated series. Set keyword triggers that route messages to the right agents instantly. Whether it's appointment reminders, promotional campaigns, or follow-ups — text gets it done faster than any other channel.
sms_page.uc1_desc: Send order updates, deliver promotions, and gather real-time customer feedback — all via text.
sms_page.uc2_desc: Manage patients, send appointment reminders, and deliver HIPAA-compliant follow-ups synced with your systems.
sms_page.uc3_desc: Communicate with guests during their stay — checkout reminders, event alerts, and personalized offers.
sms_page.integrations_desc: Connect with your existing CRM to keep contacts in sync across every app. Or integrate our text capabilities directly into your own platform.
sms_page.g1_desc: Reach more people with bulk texts to targeted contact lists.
sms_page.g2_desc: Schedule texts at specific times and automate responses based on triggers.
sms_page.g3_desc: Automatically route incoming texts to the right person on your team.
sms_page.g4_desc: Use keyword triggers for promotions and intelligent agent routing.
sms_page.g5_desc: Agents respond to customers in real time via text — personal and immediate.
sms_page.g6_desc: Organize contacts into groups with tags for precision targeting.
sms_page.g7_desc: Import or export contacts in bulk for seamless cross-platform use.
sms_page.g8_desc: Integrate with your CRM and build smart workflows with our developer-friendly API.

voice_page.hero_subtitle: Your IVR routes calls. GoEngage resolves them. AI-powered voice that handles the calls your agents shouldn't have to take.
voice_page.stat1_label: Average annual agent attrition. You spend nearly as much replacing your team as running it.
voice_page.stat2_label: Saved per AI-resolved call vs. a live agent interaction, averaging $8–$12 per call.
voice_page.stat3_label: Of CX leaders are under pressure to deploy AI immediately or risk falling behind.
voice_page.problem_title: A cycle that keeps scaling costs
voice_page.problem_desc: Agent attrition drains budgets before productivity returns. Legacy IVRs route calls without resolving them. Every live interaction costs money that scales linearly with volume. You're paying more to deliver the same — or worse — experience.
voice_page.solution_title: AI that resolves, not just routes
voice_page.solution_desc: GoEngage Voice is an AI-powered inbound voice assistant built natively into GoContact — not bolted on. It handles the calls your agents shouldn't have to take, and makes every escalation smarter with full-context handoffs.
voice_page.payback_title: 70% AI containment on a 50-seat contact center.
voice_page.payback_desc: At $8–$12 per live call, the math is simple. GoEngage Voice pays for itself in under two months by deflecting routine inbound volume — giving your agents back the time to handle what actually requires a human.
voice_page.c1_desc: Handles routine, high-volume inbound requests 24/7 — scheduling, account inquiries, claims status — automatically.
voice_page.c2_desc: Every response is anchored to your approved knowledge sources. Accurate, auditable, and always on-brand.
voice_page.c3_desc: Real-time, human-like dialogue that understands intent, handles interruptions, and resolves in a single interaction.
voice_page.c4_desc: When a call needs a human, it transfers with a complete summary. Agents skip re-explanation and go straight to solving.
voice_page.c5_desc: No integration overhead. Faster deployment, unified reporting, and one platform for your entire contact center.
voice_page.c6_desc: Instant AI coverage at a fraction of night-shift labor costs. Never miss a call, never leave a customer waiting.
voice_page.c7_desc: Billed per voice minute — not per token. No hidden fees, no usage math. Predictable costs that scale with you.
voice_page.c8_desc: AI and agent interactions in one dashboard. Track containment rates, resolution quality, and cost savings in real time.
voice_page.r3_usecase: First notice of loss & claims status
voice_page.urgency_title: 77% of organizations are already investing in voice AI. The window to lead is closing.
voice_page.urgency_desc: Gartner projects 40% of enterprise applications will embed AI agents by end of 2026. Companies that move now are deflecting calls, cutting costs, and pulling ahead. Those that wait aren't standing still — they're falling behind.

cc_page.hero_subtitle_combined: The GoContact platform unifies voice, digital, and AI—so friction is handled before the conversation begins.
cc_page.hero_subtitle2: One platform. Every channel. AI that handles the routine so your team can handle the rest.
cc_page.platform_desc1: GoContact brings voice, digital channels, and AI together in one platform, so your team isn't jumping between tools while your customer is waiting.
cc_page.platform_desc2: The AI runs in the background — routing calls, summarizing them, handling routine tasks, then analyzing them. By the time a customer talks to a person, the friction is already gone. That's what they remember. Not the hold music. The human.
cc_page.hw1_desc: Voice, chat, text, email, and social — all in one place. Zero context switching.
cc_page.hw2_desc: Handles the routine. Supports the complex. Invisible to the customer.
cc_page.hw3_desc: Smart routing and full context before your agent even says hello.
cc_page.hw4_desc: Resolves common requests automatically, before they ever reach your team.
cc_page.sm1_desc: Ask your data a question. Get an answer. No report required.
cc_page.sm2_desc: Real-time chat and social messaging, routed and tracked in one place.
cc_page.sm3_desc: Step-by-step guidance that keeps every agent consistent and confident.
cc_page.f1_desc: One interface for every channel. Agents keep context, always.
cc_page.f2_desc: Skills-based, context-aware. Customers get the right agent the first time.
cc_page.f3_desc: IVA and AI voice agents that resolve issues automatically.
cc_page.f4_desc: Voice bots, call summaries, analytics. All built in.
cc_page.f5_desc: Configure call flows, manage agents, and monitor performance from one place.
cc_page.f6_desc: Live dashboards, custom reports, and AI-powered insights across every interaction.
cc_page.persona_title: GoContact Works for Everyone in the Room
cc_page.agents_desc: They get context before the call starts. Guidance during it. Less admin after. This lets them focus on the customer — not the tool.
cc_page.managers_desc: Full visibility into your entire operation with real-time and historic analytics. See what's happening, spot the patterns, then fix the issue before it compounds.
cc_page.it_desc: One platform to configure and manage. Channel control, routing logic, and integrations — all without adding overhead.
cc_page.fq1_a: GoContact is Broadvoice's contact center platform. It connects voice, digital CX channels, AI tools, and performance analytics into one system so agents can manage interactions from one workspace.
cc_page.fq2_a: GoContact supports voice, webchat, SMS, email, and social messaging, including WhatsApp. You can manage them all together, so agents don't need to switch tools based on how a customer reaches out.
cc_page.fq3_a: Yes. GoAI is a native piece of the GoContact platform. It includes voice bot automation, post-call summaries, intelligent routing, and AI-powered analytics.
cc_page.fq4_q: Can GoContact replace our existing IVR?
cc_page.fq4_a: Absolutely! GoContact has both an Advanced IVR and IVAs that can help you replace, modernize or supplement your current self-service setup.
cc_page.fq5_q: What makes GoContact different from other CCaaS platforms?
cc_page.fq5_a: Most platforms connect your channels. GoContact does, too. What's different: the AI is built to make agents sharper, not redundant. And the platform is made to be simple to deploy, easy to manage, and fast to show ROI.
